tools.name: Imperium Intelligence Pack Builder
tools.purpose_ru: Собирает лёгкий handoff pack: manifest, indexes, SQLite, graph edges, source slices и sidecar receipt.
tools.purpose_en: Builds a lightweight handoff pack with manifest, indexes, SQLite, graph edges, source slices and sidecar receipt.
tools.validation_recipe: Run builder, Inquisition hygiene gate, and Inquisition receipt gate. Verify final ZIP SHA256 matches sidecars.
